notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Erick Fedde. Alex Bregman scores. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit by pitch. Michael Conforto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit by pitch. Matt Shaw to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Chase Meidroth scores.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ian Happ.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña steals (8) 2nd base. Luisangel Acuña to 3rd. Luisangel Acuña advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Carson Kelly.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.
